subject: update bbinputsetup to handle fabric configs
commit_message:
update bbinputsetup to handle fabric configs

set UUID for fabric configuration on create flow
set fabric configuration ID in workflowResorceIds
junit to test fabric config by vf module mapping
do not use configuration_customization for Fabric map
remove the else statement for if not configuration
added implementation for a create vf module with configs case
add in any implementation in workflowaction
added in an if statement to populate config resource keys for all
configuration bbs
added bb input setup implementation for a la carte fabric

Change-Id: Ib02d6109eeef84c198cca5f3ee8d2c0a0f17a694
Issue-ID: SO-1602
Signed-off-by: Benjamin, Max (mb388a) <mb388a@us.att.com>
